summary: All four requirements (REQ-10, REQ-11, REQ-12, REQ-13) appear to be implemented in the diff. AddTransactionModal.tsx is rewritten with proper React state binding for account selector and a validated submit handler. TransferMoneyModal.tsx is rewritten with independent From/To Select dropdowns bound to state. AccountsPage.tsx adds handleOpenTransfer and renders TransferMoneyModal with defaultFromAccountId. BottomNavigation.tsx fixes the modal prop name. useQueries.ts includes useTransferMoney and useAddTransaction mutations with cache invalidation.

hallucinated_features.description: The To account dropdown in TransferMoneyModal filters out the currently selected From account, preventing same-account transfers. This extra same-account exclusion logic was not explicitly requested.
hallucinated_features.reason: The requirements only ask that both dropdowns be interactive and pass correct IDs to the mutation; filtering the To list based on From selection is an undocumented addition.
